title: Healthier Tuff
description: Removes the sickly green hue from tuff and tuff variants, making it nicer to build with.
body: Removes the sickly green hue from tuff and tuff variants, making it nicer to build with. The blocks have been given a faint blue tint and desaturated. While the original colour worked well with copper, it was very limiting and felt like it frequently clashed with other build pallets.
